criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent to which the app leverages AI to enhance productivity, including features like content generation, task automation, and intelligent suggestions.
criteria.sources: Zapier, Motion, iAppList, Synthesia, TimeCamp, V7 Labs, Various

criteria.name: Task Management
criteria.description: The app's ability to help users manage tasks, projects, and schedules effectively, often through features like automated scheduling, reminders, and progress tracking.
criteria.sources: Motion, iAppList, Synthesia, TimeCamp, V7 Labs, Various

criteria.name: Content Creation
criteria.description: The app's capacity to assist users in generating various forms of content, such as text, images, and videos, leveraging AI for enhanced creativity and efficiency.

criteria.name: Communication & Collaboration
criteria.description: The app's features that facilitate seamless communication and collaboration among team members, including real-time messaging, file sharing, and integrated workflows.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: How intuitive, efficient, and enjoyable the app is to use, considering factors like ease of navigation, customization options, and overall design.
